proven_l_per_lane.trend: DECLINED 45% — but lesson counting from notes may undercount

proven_diminishing_returns.note: INVERTED from S363 pattern. May reflect lesson-count methodology sensitivity.

struggling_dispatch.note: STRUGGLING domains never dispatched in 22 sessions despite recommendation at S373

root_cause_analysis.mixed_collapse: UCB1 exploration term drives ~37% of dispatch to UNLABELED domains (new/rare). Within labeled domains, PROVEN (41%) > MIXED (23%) — MIXED_BONUS (2.0) insufficient to overcome PROVEN's higher exploit score. The S373 interim measured the initial impulse response; steady-state is dominated by exploration.
root_cause_analysis.meta_rebound: Meta domain has highest visit count (N=86) but MIXED label — high exploit score (3.234) overcomes cooldown. Cooldown applies per-domain, not per-label.
root_cause_analysis.l_per_lane_decline: L/lane declined across ALL categories (MIXED 1.42→1.18, PROVEN 1.21→0.67). Possible methodological artifact: lesson references in notes field are sparse for archived lanes. Also consistent with diminishing marginal returns at N>600 lessons.

verdict.overall: F-EXP10 scoring changes (MIXED_BONUS, reduced PROVEN_BONUS) produced transient effect (S373 interim) that did NOT sustain at 20-session mark. UCB1 exploration dominates steady-state dispatch.
